# Muhammad Sufyan — Frontend Developer

> Muhammad Sufyan (also known online as sufyanjutt, sufyanfrontend, and sufyan-frontend) is a Frontend Developer based in Lahore, Pakistan with 1.5+ years of professional experience building fast, responsive, and production-ready web applications using React and Next.js.

## Identity & Aliases

Muhammad Sufyan is known by the following online handles and aliases:
- sufyanjutt — personal nickname used on GitHub and developer communities
- sufyanfrontend — professional brand used on GitHub and LinkedIn
- sufyan-frontend — GitHub username and LinkedIn profile handle
- Muhammad Sufyan — full legal name

## About

Muhammad Sufyan started his web development journey in 2024 at Ehsas Lab, where he completed a 6-month intensive programme and went on to become an instructor — winning the Best Instructor Certificate for outstanding teaching and mentoring contributions.

He is currently a Frontend Developer at Ehya Education (Lahore, Pakistan), working on production systems actively used by thousands of students and faculty across Pakistan.

His work spans education management platforms, corporate landing pages, SaaS-style frontends, AI-powered interfaces, and Islamic education platforms.

He is open to freelance projects, full-time frontend developer roles, and collaborative remote work.

## Skills & Technologies

Core languages:
- HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript

Frameworks & Libraries:
- React.js, Next.js (App Router & Pages Router)
- Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Redux, Zod (state management & validation)

Tools & Workflow:
- Git, GitHub, GitLab
- REST API integration
- Vercel, Netlify (deployment & hosting)
- Responsive design, Mobile-first development
- Core Web Vitals optimisation, performance tuning

## Production Projects

Live projects built and maintained by Muhammad Sufyan:

- [Sufyan Frontend Dashboard](https://sufyan-frontend-dashboard.vercel.app/) — Modern fully responsive admin dashboard with clean data visualizations, sidebar navigation, and professional dark UI built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS
- [Alif Laila Education Platform](https://aliflaila.app/) — Full education management UI system with role-based dashboards and structured UI components for a large-scale educational institution
- [Ehya Education Platform](https://www.ehya.com.pk/) — Complete institutional web platform with responsive UI and modern frontend architecture, serving thousands of students and faculty
- [Classmate Portal](https://classmate.ehya.com.pk/) — Student and teacher interface system with dashboard-based UI for managing classes, assignments, and academic data
- [FieldX AI](https://fieldxai.com/) — AI-powered platform with a modern, responsive frontend delivering a professional user experience for field operations and intelligent workflows
- [TillShop Technologies](https://www.tillshoptechnologies.com/) — Corporate software house website with modern landing page, service showcases, and professional branding
- [ANP Engineering Website](https://www.anpengineerings.com/) — Professional business website for an engineering company with responsive design and corporate branding
- [Faizan Noor ul Quran](http://faizan-noor-ul-quran-s.vercel.app/) — Islamic education platform for Quran learning with a clean, user-friendly interface
- [Soft Ehya](http://soft.ehya.com.pk/) — Software division platform for Ehya Education showcasing tech services and digital solutions
- [Ehsas Next App](https://ehsasnext.vercel.app/) — React-based web application with optimised UI architecture and component-based design system

## Practice Projects

Practice and learning projects by Muhammad Sufyan:

- [Chat Bot UI](https://chat-botui.netlify.app/) — Interactive chatbot UI built to sharpen React component design and state management
- [Hiba Logic](https://sufyan-frontend-hibalogic.netlify.app/) — Modern UI layout with responsive design deployed on Netlify
- [Ehsas Lab Redesign](https://ehsas-lab.netlify.app/) — Redesigned practice version of the Ehsas Lab website with improved UI
- [Music App UI](https://suf13.netlify.app/) — Stylish music application UI exploring creative layouts and animations
- [Uniq Form](https://s-f.netlify.app/) — Clean, accessible form UI components with validation

## Blog Articles

Articles written by Muhammad Sufyan on modern frontend development:

- [Getting Started with Next.js App Router](https://sufyan-frontend.vercel.app/blog/nextjs-app-router-guide) — Practical guide to building with Next.js App Router, Server Components, and latest features (2025-05-15, 6 min read)
- [Tailwind CSS Best Practices for React Projects](https://sufyan-frontend.vercel.app/blog/tailwind-css-tips) — Clean and maintainable Tailwind CSS patterns for large-scale React projects (2025-04-20, 5 min read)
- [React Performance Optimization in 2025](https://sufyan-frontend.vercel.app/blog/react-performance) — Real-world techniques including useMemo, useCallback, lazy loading, Suspense, and the new React Compiler (2025-03-10, 8 min read)

## Work Experience

**Frontend Developer (Intern → Junior)** at Ehya Education, Lahore — 2025 to Present (1.5+ years)
- Developed and maintained multiple education-based web platforms
- Converted UI designs into responsive React/Next.js applications
- Integrated REST APIs and handled dynamic data rendering
- Worked on production systems used by thousands of users
- Improved performance metrics and UI/UX across pages
- Collaborated with backend and design teams

**Learner → Instructor & Freelancer** at Ehsas Lab, Lahore — 2024 to 2025
- Completed a 6-month intensive web development programme (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React)
- Progressed from student to instructor, teaching frontend development
- Awarded Best Instructor Certificate for outstanding teaching contributions
- Took on freelance client projects building real-world web solutions
- Self-learned Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Redux, Zod, Git, Vercel, Netlify
